norm_1.content: No one should tell others how to behave in the cafe.
norm_1.subject: no one
norm_1.object: others how to behave in the cafe

norm_2.content: People should not interfere with others' personal choices.
norm_2.subject: people

norm_3.content: Individuals should be free to engage in any activity without judgment.
norm_3.subject: individuals
norm_3.object: to engage in any activity without judgment

norm_4.content: Others should not police minor rule-breaking in the cafe.
norm_4.subject: others

norm_5.content: Everyone should respect others' right to make their own decisions.
norm_5.subject: everyone
norm_5.object: others' right to make their own decisions
